long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Acadia Node Memory High Utilization [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/platform/alerts/troubleshooting_acadia_than_os_alerts.md#4-high-usage-of-node-memory
TIP Situation:                      Observed service-saturation-node_high_memory_utilization issue in Osprey-Acadia-OS
TIP Short Description:              Acadia node memory high utilization
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:storage-platform-acadia:us-south::mzonec11:microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    100 - (node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{agent_tag_cluster_type="acadia", agent_tag_cluster!~"dummy"} / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{agent_tag_cluster_type="acadia", agent_tag_cluster!~"dummy"}  * 100) > 85 = 98.48
Segment:
    __tenant_id__ = 'acadia-ng-dal-prod' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'us-south' and instance = '10.1.132.3:9100' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzonec11' and agent_tag_cluster = 'mzonec11' and agent_tag_cluster_type = 'acadia' and host_hostname = 'dal2-qz1-sr3-rk006-s06' and job = 'acadia-node-exporter'

Time:                12/01/2025 05:38 PM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [Acadia-SRE]-Acadia Node Memory High Utilization [DAL]
Description:    Acadia node memory high utilization
Team:           storage-platform-acadia
Scope:
